creator: don_oles@able.com.ua
text:
if dhcpd_chroot_enable set to YES then 'make deinstall' of the port
isc-dhcp30-server (and possibly other versions) actually removes the
/var/db/dhcpd folder along with dhcpd.leases file. This makes every
upgrade forget the leases.

How-To-Repeat: install dhcpd chroot-enabled.
run the dhcpd
run make deinstall in the port directory
